request.description:
Search for any dependency that is being used in your organization.

This endpoint consumes 1 unit of your quota.

This endpoint requires the following org token scopes:
- No Scopes Required, but authentication is required

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

description.content:
Retry contacting the endpoint *at least* after seconds.
See https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-7.1.3

query.description: The UTC date in YYYY-MM-DD format for which to fetch dependencies
The number of days of data to fetch as an offset from input date
Comma-separated list of repo full names that should be included
Comma-separated list of repo slugs that should be included
Comma-separated list of repo labels that should be included
Comma-separated list of artifact types (e.g. "npm", "pypi", "gem", "maven", "golang", etc.) that should be included
Direct/transitive dependency filter flag
Development/production dependency filter flag
Dead/reachable dependency filter flag

request.description:
Trend analytics of historical dependencies.

This endpoint consumes 10 units of your quota.

This endpoint requires the following org token scopes:
- historical:dependencies-trend

response.name: The trend data
